name: omega
_comment: Phase 3.7: package.json + node_modules + bunfig + vite + knip + tsconfigs are intentionally retained for the surviving Playwright suite. They exit alongside Playwright in Phase 4 (chromiumoxide + LLM oracle). The unused devDependencies (vite/solid-js/etc.) are kept inert here so a single Phase-4 commit can yank them in lockstep with the Playwright deletion.
